codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested Signer Policy Prompt and Signing Failed overlays, including trigger controls, modal content, dismissal paths (close/action/backdrop), and backdrop overlay behavior. I found no high-confidence functional defects against the feature contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Architecture guidance states icons should come from lucide-react, but this feature includes an inline SVG icon for the Signer Policy warning glyph; AGENTS.md does not restate that icon-source convention, which may make this rule easy to miss.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:140 specifies lucide-react icons; src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx:701 uses inline <svg> for the warning icon; mission AGENTS.md has no icon-source rule.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-builder skill mandates TDD ('Write Tests First'), but the transcript sequence shows implementation edits before creating the modal test file; handoff still reports followedProcedure=true. This suggests a mismatch between enforced practice and skill expectations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-builder/SKILL.md:41 requires tests-first; transcript for session 39057c55-e7fd-4418-9700-2f2c93dc648e shows Edit operations on src/styles/global.css and src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx before Tool: Create src/screens/__tests__/DashboardModals.test.tsx.

summary: Reviewed dashboard-modals commit 0c4535b and related worker transcript/handoff; feature behavior matches description and expectedBehavior with no blocking code issues found. Logged shared-state observations about icon-source convention visibility and ui-builder tests-first procedure drift.
